# Netlab

> Netlab is a public network diagnostics workspace for DNS, IP, subnet, ping, WHOIS, DNS propagation, and bounded public port checks.

## Canonical site
- https://netlab.tools/

## Main tool pages
- https://netlab.tools/ip-checker
- https://netlab.tools/dns-lookup
- https://netlab.tools/subnet-calc
- https://netlab.tools/ping
- https://netlab.tools/whois
- https://netlab.tools/dns-propagation
- https://netlab.tools/port-scan

## Preferred description
Netlab helps users inspect public IP details, query DNS records, monitor DNS propagation, calculate subnets, test host reachability with ping, look up WHOIS data, and run bounded public port checks.

## Public safety policy
- Private, loopback, link-local, multicast, and reserved targets are blocked.
- Port scans are bounded and limited to public targets.

## Freshness
- Canonical URLs are listed in `/sitemap.xml`.
- Site changes can be submitted through IndexNow when configured by the operator.

## Full reference
- https://netlab.tools/llms-full.txt
